messages.message: Binary operation "/" between float|int<min, 999> and -400|0|100|400|500|900|1000 results in an error.
Comparison operation ">" between int<1, max> and 0 is always true.
messages.tip: Because the type is coming from a PHPDoc, you can turn off this check by setting treatPhpDocTypesAsCertain: false in your %configurationFile%.
